title: Unturned Guns Pack
description: An addon for Vic's Point Blank that adds Unturned weapons into Minecraft, reanimated and with some extra weapon mods!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XKeAy5ZbW5A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is an addon for Vic's Point Blank that adds all the base game guns from Unturned, completely reanimated! There's also a few other miscellaneous items as well as most of the attachments as well as a large amount of new attachments that improve specific guns or even transform how they work!

Expect more weapons eventually - France guns and the base game melees at some point in the future.

# 1.20.1 Users
This version now supports 1.20.1 versions of Minecraft starting with pack version 1.1 (the France Guns update). However, it still crashes on the Forge version of Vic's Point Blank. If you use Forge on 1.20.1, you must use the fork of VPB called Pointblank: Jelly available here:

https://modrinth.com/mod/pb-jelly

Some nonessential weapon salvaging recipes also do not work on 1.20.1, but all the important recipes you need to actually make the guns work.

# Features

![All the guns included in the mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87f561ef1ab0c40f5352c1f1ada6a0829ea3b6a7.png)

All 53 ranged weapons in the Unturned base game.

![A wide range of attachments.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c95eceea1ef689ff57190d82f67e9b86ccad428a_0.webp)

Many of Unturned's attachments are present, as well as many new ones tailor-made for one specific gun to enhance how they work, from a hand cannon upgrade for the Ace and Desert Falcon to a super customized Eaglefire and PDW!



# Installation

Put the gunpack .zip folder in the "pointblank" folder at the root of your Minecraft instance. If the folder does not exist, make it. Of course, the addon also requires the [Vic's Point Blank mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank).

# Updating

If you are updating to v1.1 of the guns pack, delete /config/pointblank-items.toml, or else the weapons will have incorrect damage values on them.
